text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, March 03. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Reviewing our household budget today. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Understood. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Updating our financial spreadsheets. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: I can run some projections for you. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
